home.offerings_desc: We bring traditional devotional practices to the modern world, making your spiritual journey accessible and serene.
home.feature_donation_desc: Securely contribute with various payment methods. Receipts generated instantly for tax benefits.
home.feature_abhishek_desc: Schedule special poojas and abhishek rituals at your preferred time without queues.
home.feature_live_desc: Join us for daily aarti and darshan via high-quality live streaming from your home.
home.feature_event_desc: Stay updated and easily register for upcoming spiritual camps and major temple festivals.
home.analytics_desc: See the impact of our digital initiative across the globe.
home.branch_andheri_title: Shri Gurumurti Rudrapashupati Lingayat Monastery - Andheri
home.branch_andheri_desc: The main branch established in 1995, offering all major pooja facilities and a massive hall for devotees.
home.upcoming_events_desc: Join us in celebrating major festivals and spiritual gatherings.
home.event_desc: Join us for the grand celebration of Maha Navami with special havan and aarti.
home.testimonial_desc: "The online darshan feels incredibly peaceful. The website makes it so easy to offer donations and book annadaan seamlessly without visiting the crowded branch."
home.cta_desc: Become a part of our spiritual journey. Join the online community to stay connected with the roots of our rich heritage.

footer.brand_desc: Experience the divine connection digitally. We bring the temple's sacred environment to you through modern digital services, live darshan, and authentic pooja bookings.
footer.rights: © {{year}} Shri Gurumurti Rudrapashupati Lingayat Monastery Trust. All rights reserved.

donation.title: Support the Divine Cause
donation.subtitle: "Your contribution helps us maintain the temple, organize annadaan, and support community welfare activities."
donation.secure_text: 100% Secure payments via Razorpay. Encrypted & protected.
donation.scan_desc: Use any UPI app (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm) to scan the QR code below.
donation.tax_desc_1: All donations made to the Temple Trust are eligible for tax exemption under section 80G of the Income Tax Act.
donation.tax_desc_2: A valid 80G receipt will be sent to your email address within 24 hours of successful payment.
donation.error_sdk: Razorpay SDK failed to load. Are you online?

auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to continue your spiritual journey
auth.register_subtitle: Register to book donations and annadaan
auth.password_hint: Passwords must be at least 6 characters.

annadaan.hero_subtitle: Feeding the hungry is the highest form of worship. Sponsor a meal and receive divine blessings.
annadaan.form_desc_placeholder: E.g. In memory of..., Birthday, Anniversary...
annadaan.booking_error: Booking failed. Please check your inputs.
annadaan.val_email: Please enter a valid email address
annadaan.receipt_desc: Thank you for sponsoring Annadaan. Your booking details are below. A copy of this receipt has been emailed to you.
annadaan.importance_desc: In Hindu scriptures, sharing food is considered the greatest virtue. Annadaan satisfies a primary need instantly.
annadaan.quote: “अन्नं वै प्राणाः” - Food is indeed life itself.
annadaan.quote_meaning: By offering food, you offer the gift of life. It is the highest form of charity (Mahadana) that brings absolute peace and prosperity.
annadaan.meal_full: Full Day Annadaan Seva (पूर्ण दिवस अन्नदान)
annadaan.val_phone_digits: Phone number must be exactly 10 digits
annadaan.imp_sub1_desc: Food maintains life, so feeding a hungry person supports life itself.
annadaan.imp_sub2_desc: Satisfying others' hunger cleanses past karma and clears spiritual blocks.
annadaan.imp_sub3_desc: Food is the only donation where the recipient is completely satisfied instantly.

live_page.hero_subtitle: Connect with the divine from anywhere in the world. Experience the daily rituals and chants live.
live_page.no_live_desc: Please check the schedule below for upcoming live aarati, bhajan, and special pravachan events.
live_page.mute_notice: Autoplay is muted. Unmute in player if needed.
live_page.default_desc: Witness the holy rituals, morning and evening aarati, and live chants. Bring the divine vibration to your home.
live_page.no_upcoming: No future events scheduled at the moment. Please stay tuned!
live_page.unable_modal: Unable to load video stream direct player.
live_page.modal_default_desc: Past temple event / Aarati broadcast record.

about.title: About Our Temple
about.subtitle: "Preserving ancient traditions and spreading spiritual awakening for over three decades."
about.history_desc_1: 1008 Rudrapashupati Kolekar Maharaj is remembered as a respected spiritual leader associated with the Rudrapashupati Lingayat Monastery tradition of Maharashtra. The spiritual tradition is deeply connected with Shiva devotion, Lingayat culture, and the Guru-Shishya parampara.
about.history_desc_2: The Monastery has guided devotees through spirituality, devotion, religious teachings, and community service. It continues to preserve spiritual values, humanity, and cultural traditions through various religious and social activities.
about.mission_desc: To continue the profound spiritual work of 1008 Rudrapashupati Kolekar Maharaj by spreading devotion, discipline, and service to humanity.
about.vision_desc: A society rooted in the divine teachings of the Lingayat Monastery tradition, guided by compassion, equality, and selfless service.

services.title: Temple Services
services.subtitle: "Offering diverse spiritual avenues to deepen your devotion."
services.pooja_desc: Schedule personalized poojas with our learned priests.
services.prasad_desc: Order sacred Prasad delivered right to your doorstep.
services.abhishek_desc: Participate in grand abhishek ceremonies on special days.
services.live_desc: Experience daily aarti and darshan live from your home.
services.venue_desc: Book our temple halls for auspicious ceremonies and weddings.
services.consult_desc: Seek guidance from our senior priests.

events.title: Upcoming Events
events.subtitle: "Join our community in grand celebrations and spiritual gatherings."
events.event_desc: Experience a full day of devotion, kirtan, and grand annadaan. Register early to secure your spot for the special seated pooja.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: "We are here to assist you on your spiritual journey."

notfound.subtitle: Page Not Found
notfound.desc: The path you are looking for has been relocated or doesn't exist.

vanshaval.title: Spiritual Lineage
vanshaval.subtitle: The divine succession of Maharajs guiding our path.
vanshaval.saint_1_desc: A respected spiritual leader associated with the Rudrapashupati Lingayat Monastery tradition, guiding devotees through devotion and community service.
vanshaval.saint_2_desc: The revered Guru under whose guidance Shivacharya Kolekar Maharaj received his profound spiritual education at the Jangamwadi Math.
vanshaval.saint_3_desc: The lineage of 29 great saints who preserved and passed down the sacred traditions of the Rudra Pashupati Monastery before Shivacharya Kolekar Maharaj.
vanshaval.saint_4_desc: The Trust and devotees who continue to carry forward the teachings, traditions, and the Kole to Shikhar Shingnapur Palkhi.

about_adv.hero_subtitle: Discover the profound history, values, and vision that drive our mission to serve humanity and spread divine light.
about_adv.mission_text: To nurture spiritual growth and promote universal peace through the timeless teachings of devotion and selfless service.
about_adv.vision_text: A world united in harmony, where every soul finds inner peace and communities thrive on compassion and equality.
about_adv.founder_text: 1008 Rudrapashupati Kolekar Maharaj is remembered as a respected spiritual leader associated with the Rudrapashupati Lingayat Monastery tradition of Maharashtra. He guided devotees through spirituality, devotion, and religious teachings.
about_adv.values_text: “Devotion, discipline, and service to humanity are the true paths of spirituality.”
about_adv.portal_gallery_desc: Experience the vibrant moments from our festivals, charity drives, and daily aartis.
about_adv.portal_events_desc: Participate in upcoming spiritual camps, grand celebrations, and community services.
about_adv.portal_branches_desc: Locate our spiritual centers across the globe and connect with your local community.
about_adv.shiva_roop_desc: The Rudrapashupati Monastery tradition is known for its spiritual guidance, religious teachings, Lingayat traditions, devotional programs, and community unity. Devotees from Maharashtra and Karnataka actively participate in Guru Pournima celebrations, Dindi Sohala, Guru Diksha Programs, and daily Bhajan & Kirtan, ensuring the preservation of our cultural traditions.
about_adv.tech_desc: Our Trust Management System is built on modern, secure digital infrastructure. We ensure that every donation, event registration, and community outreach is tracked with absolute transparency, efficiency, and data integrity.
about_adv.tech_stat_1_desc: 100% digitally tracked and secured via enterprise-grade payment gateways.
about_adv.tech_stat_2_desc: Cloud-synchronized operations ensuring real-time coordination across all branches.
about_adv.tech_stat_3_desc: Advanced encryption protocols protecting all devotee and donor information.
